input.command:
cd /tmp
for s in admin-user-password app-user-password readonly-user-password; do
  echo "$s: $(kubectl get secret $s -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data}')"
done
echo "---STS/SVC---"
kubectl get sts,svc -n mongodb 2>&1

input.description: Look at stage files and sts env

content.content:
agent.log
kubectl_log.jsonl
precondition.log
prompt.txt
proxy-client.crt
proxy-client.key
proxy.pid
---
A 3-member MongoDB replica set is running in the mongodb namespace.
Authentication is enabled. Passwords are stored in these Secrets:
- admin-user-password
- app-user-password
- readonly-user-password

Task:
- app-user must have readWrite on appdb.
- readonly-user must have read on appdb and a custom role reportingRole.
- reportingRole must allow read access to appdb.reports (aggregate should succeed).
- Do not break admin access or existing data.

Notes:
- Do not use operators or CRDs.===STSyaml===
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--replSet","mongodb-replica","--bind_ip_all","--auth","--keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile"],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-keyfile","name":"mongo-keyfile","readOnly":true}]}],"securityContext":{"runAsGroup":0,"runAsUser":0},"volumes":[{"name":"mongo-keyfile","secret":{"defaultMode":256,"secretName":"mongo-keyfile"}}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T08:15:03Z"
  generation: 1
  name: mongodb-replica
--
      - command:
        - mongod
        - --replSet
        - mongodb-replica

content.text: Now let me verify everything works as required.

input.command:
echo "=== Final user/role state ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:admin123password@localhost:27017/admin" --eval '
printjson(db.getSiblingDB("admin").getUsers().users.map(u=>({user:u.user, roles:u.roles})));
printjson(db.getSiblingDB("appdb").getRole("reportingRole",{showPrivileges:true}));
' 2>&1

echo "=== app-user readWrite test (insert+read on appdb) ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://app-user:app123password@localhost:27017/appdb" --eval '
db.rwtest.insertOne({t:1}); print("insert ok"); print("count="+db.rwtest.countDocuments({})); db.rwtest.drop(); print("cleanup ok");
' 2>&1

echo "=== readonly-user aggregate on appdb.reports (must succeed) ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://readonly-user:readonly123password@localhost:27017/appdb" --eval '
printjson(db.reports.aggregate([{$group:{_id:null, total:{$sum:"$x"}, n:{$sum:1}}}]).toArray());
' 2>&1

echo "=== readonly-user must NOT write (expect failure) ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://readonly-user:readonly123password@localhost:27017/appdb" --eval 'db.reports.insertOne({bad:1})' 2>&1 | grep -i -e unauthorized -e "not allowed" | head -1

echo "=== admin still works ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:admin123password@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'print("admin ping="+db.runCommand({ping:1}).ok); print("reports preserved="+db.getSiblingDB("appdb").reports.countDocuments({}))' 2>&1

content.text: App/readonly users authenticate against the `admin` db (that's where they were created), so I need `authSource=admin` in the connection string.

input.command:
echo "=== app-user readWrite test ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://app-user:app123password@localhost:27017/appdb?authSource=admin" --eval '
db.rwtest.insertOne({t:1}); print("insert ok"); print("count="+db.rwtest.countDocuments({})); db.rwtest.drop(); print("cleanup ok");
' 2>&1

echo "=== readonly-user aggregate on appdb.reports (must succeed) ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://readonly-user:readonly123password@localhost:27017/appdb?authSource=admin" --eval '
printjson(db.reports.aggregate([{$group:{_id:null, total:{$sum:"$x"}, n:{$sum:1}}}]).toArray());
' 2>&1

echo "=== readonly-user must NOT write (expect unauthorized) ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://readonly-user:readonly123password@localhost:27017/appdb?authSource=admin" --eval 'try{db.reports.insertOne({bad:1}); print("WROTE-BAD")}catch(e){print("blocked: "+e.codeName)}' 2>&1 | tail -1
